"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.1.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\282A___Bit__.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\282A___Bit__.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\282A___Bit__.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\282A___Bit__.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o 282A___Bit__.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib282A___Bit__.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\282A___Bit__.dir\linklibs.rsp
